project: PRJ03160 - SLB - SLB Denmark - GBN12 (N-12)_GBN43 (N-43)_GBN17 (N-17) - MFC_ ZeroTime
comment: M.H down-man today. Container 44130 ready for backload, 2XMFC40 Caliper needs attention and the MFC24 (216330) needs deep cleaning very sticky oil got inside the cage. MFC24 was cleaned up with power wash, was not enough to remove the sticky oil. Needs to be soaked off in WD40. Also add miscellaneous stuff like WD40 to this container before remob. Hac001 00853 y 024024 need also being soak off in WD40 before remob
